parameters.name: search
parameters.description: General text search across searchable columns (name)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort column. Prefix with - for descending (e.g. -name). Sortable: name, created_at, updated_at.

parameters.name: included[]
parameters.description: Columns to include in response (DataTable column selection)

parameters.name: table_specifications
parameters.description: Return column specifications instead of data
